3023880.name: Yellow House
3023880.description:
Sometimes it’s hard to figure out what is real and what is a phantom of a fevered mind.
Despite all the attempts to leave the past behind the aftershocks of childhood experiences keep haunting the lead character depriving him of all the rest. That made Artem face his fears and come back to his hometown – the cradle of his nightmares – looking for the only man who could understand him and was always there for him in his darkest hours. But the home ground meets Artem chilly: he starts seeing things in the gloom of a half-forgotten town, and all roads lead to a local landmark — a yellow house, which threatens to turn into a trap for anyone who crosses its threshold.



Yellow House is a non-linear visual novel in the psychological horror genre. The story takes place in a town surrounded by thick woods in the far north. It’s a place where you can't trust anyone, maybe even yourself.


  • Enthralling gruesome story, which will make you doubt the reality of what is happening.
  • 1-bit-styled graphics will immerse you into a gloomy atmosphere of desperation.
  • Original soundtrack.
  • Plot twists.
  • Disturbing, oppressive atmosphere.
  • Distinctive characters.
  • Multipath narration. Be careful with choices.
  • Help the main character stay sane. Or prevent him from doing it.
  • Try not to die.
